Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface IAttributedSymbol

All Known Subinterfaces:
IIdentifierSymbolInfo, ILabelSymbolInfo, ISymbolInfo<E,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttributedSymbol, IdentifierSymbolInfo, IdentifierSymbolTableTests.TestIdentifierSymbolInfo, LabelSymbolInfo, LabelSymbolTableTests.TestLabelSymbolInfo, SymbolInfo
public interface IAttributedSymbol
Protocol for managing attributes of symbols.

This is a simplified variant of IInternalElement

Since:
1.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IAttributeType[]
    getAttributeTypes()
    Returns an array of the types of all attributes currently attached to this element.
    boolean
    getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type)
    Returns the value of the attribute with the given boolean type and carried by this element.
    IRodinElement
    getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type)
    Returns the value of the attribute with the given handle type and carried by this element.
    int
    getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type)
    Returns the value of the attribute with the given integer type and carried by this element.
    long
    getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type)
    Returns the value of the attribute with the given long integer type and carried by this element.
    String
    getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type)
    Returns the value of the attribute with the given string type and carried by this element.
    boolean
    hasAttribute(IAttributeType type)
    Tells whether this element carries an attribute with the given type.
    void
    setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type, boolean newValue)
    Sets the value of the attribute with the given boolean type to the given value.
    void
    setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type, IRodinElement newValue)
    Sets the value of the attribute with the given handle type to the given value.
    void
    setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type, int newValue)
    Sets the value of the attribute with the given integer type to the given value.
    void
    setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type, long newValue)
    Sets the value of the attribute with the given long integer type to the given value.
    void
    setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type, String newValue)
    Sets the value of the attribute with the given string type to the given value.

  • Method Details

    • getAttributeTypes

      IAttributeType[] getAttributeTypes()
      Returns an array of the types of all attributes currently attached to this element. If this element doesn't carry any attribute, an empty array is returned.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Returns:
      the types of all attributes of this element

    • getAttributeValue

      boolean getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given boolean type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no attribute value is stored for the attribute type

    • getAttributeValue

      IRodinElement getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given handle type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no attribute value is stored for the attribute type

    • getAttributeValue

      int getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given integer type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no attribute value is stored for the attribute type

    • getAttributeValue

      long getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given long integer type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no attribute value is stored for the attribute type

    • getAttributeValue

      String getAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given string type and carried by this element.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the attribute with the given type
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no attribute value is stored for the attribute type

    • hasAttribute

      boolean hasAttribute(IAttributeType type)
      Tells whether this element carries an attribute with the given type.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      Returns:
      true iff this element carries an attribute with the given type

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Boolean type, boolean newValue)
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given boolean type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the attribute value for the attribute type cannot be set

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Handle type, IRodinElement newValue)
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given handle type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the attribute value for the attribute type cannot be set

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Integer type, int newValue)
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given integer type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the attribute value for the attribute type cannot be set

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.Long type, long newValue)
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given long integer type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the attribute value for the attribute type cannot be set

    • setAttributeValue

      void setAttributeValue(IAttributeType.String type, String newValue)
      Sets the value of the attribute with the given string type to the given value. If the specified attribute didn't exist, it is created.

      The file containing this element is opened by this operation.

      Parameters:
      type - type of the attribute
      newValue - value to set
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the attribute value for the attribute type cannot be set
